# ModelPreferences.IntelligencePriority property

OPTIONAL (range 0 to 1 inclusive). How much to prioritize intelligence and capability: `0` means intelligence is not important, `1` means it is the most important factor (spec §21.2.9).

```csharp
public double? IntelligencePriority { get; set; }
```
